field_notes.reference_frame: keyframe3,keyframe2,keyframe1,keyframe4,keyframe5 priority order; otherwise nearest common frame. The mapping between workbook keyframes and legacy T1/T2 labels must be confirmed before external release.
field_notes.ttc_s: ego_veh.TTC at the reference frame; negative or missing source values stay blank and mark the row for review.
field_notes.thw_s: ego_veh.THW at the reference frame; negative values stay blank and mark the row for review.
field_notes.relative_speed_kmh: cut-in vehicle speed minus ego speed; negative means cut-in vehicle is slower.
field_notes.longitudinal_gap_m: ego_veh.DHW at the reference frame when non-negative; otherwise geometric fallback with a quality note.
field_notes.cutin_angle_deg: signed heading difference, cut-in vehicle heading minus ego heading, normalized to [-180, 180].
